Bibi Coach Bot ● Active
Hi! I saw yesterday's workout was cut slightly short. Your telemetry shows you ran out of battery (W'bal hit 0 kJ) on the 3rd interval.

That's completely fine! It means you gave 100% effort, but your FTP was likely set too low. I have drafted an FTP increase to 205W for your next plan block. How are you feeling today?
